titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Labor-Management Relations, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday May 15, 2025 at 03:00

did.abstract: The records consist of correspondence, memoranda, and news clippings documenting contract negotiations between Yale and Local 34, Local 35, and the police union; union organizing drives; and labor strikes.

corpname.part: Yale University. Dept of Human Resources

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 5-G (YRG 5-G), Records documenting personnel services at Yale University.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were transferred from the Labor-Management Relations office, 2005.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The collection is partially restricted. See collection contents for details.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Labor-Management Relations, Yale University, Records (RU 977). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by topic.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of correspondence, memoranda, and news clippings documenting contract negotiations between Yale and Local 34, Local 35, and the police union; union organizing drives; and labor strikes.

corpname.part: Yale University. Dept of Human Resources

did.unittitle: Records relating to union negotiations at Yale

odd.head: General
odd.p: The News clippings and printed materials series is open for research. The Yale records series is closed until January 1, 2031 by order of the Office of the Secretary.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

did.unittitle: Joint letter to President Giamatti: minority student groups in support of striking employees
Local 34: letters, calendars, notes and ephemera
Local 34 union organizing: election fact book and memorabilia
National Labor Relations Board news clippings
United Automobile Workers: correspondence and ephemera
Yale Non-Faculty Action Committee: news clippings
Local 35/35 report: economic discrimination at Yale
Local 35 bargaining manual: correspondence and statistics
Local 35 National Labor Relations Board (NRLB) case transcript
Local 35 National Labor Relations Board (NRLB) correspondence
Local 35 negotiations: final agreement, signature copies
Local 35 negotitations: management communications and correspondence
Local 35 side letters and side agreements
Local 35 supplemental agreeements and side letters
Local 142 Wage and employment relation agreement
National Labor Relations Board: unfair labor practice correspondence (Local 34)
National Labor Relations Board: Local 104 vs. Yale transcript
Picketing and protesting in Yale buildings: correspondence
Agreement: Yale University and Yale Police Benevolent Association-draft
Agreement: Yale University and Yale Police Benevolent Association-final
State of Connecticut Labor Relations Board: correspondence
Strike contingency plans: correspondence and presentations
Students for Democratic Society and other student groups: correspondence, news clippings and ephemera
Union organizing: correspondence, ephemera and news clippings
Union organizing drive: correspondence and ephemera
Union organizing drive: correspondence and ephemera
Union organizing drive: correspondence and ephemera
Yale Non-Faculty Action Committee: correspondence and ephemera
Yale Non-Faculty Action Committee: petitions and correspondence
